General.Name: DATA MODUL Aktiengesellschaft Produktion und Vertrieb von elektronischen Systemen
General.Description: DATA MODUL Aktiengesellschaft Produktion und Vertrieb von elektronischen Systemen, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes flatbed displays, monitors, electronic subassemblies, and information systems in Germany and internationally. It operates in two segments, Displays and Systems. The company offers hardware components, including optical and structural bonding; custom, TFT, MiP, e-paper, passive, miniLED, and OLED displays, as well as LED solutions; touch solutions, such as easyTOUCH starter kit, PCAP products, custom touch sensors and tails, and software and tuning; electronics comprising eMotion LCD controller boards, single board computers, and computer-on-modules; peripherals, which include core components, encoders and operating elements, cables, power supply, colling solutions, display and monitor accessories, and other; and monitors and panel PCs. It also provides software solutions, such as operating systems; application software comprising easyANALYZER and maXcs software suite; cyber security; cloud services; and AI and ML solutions, which consists of machine vision systems, integrated solutions, and embedded AI platforms. In addition, the company offers various services, including design-in; research and development, such as electronics design, mechanical and system engineering, process development, software, mock-up and prototyping, and proof-of-concept; qualification, testing, documentation, and compliance; manufacturing; logistics and corporate; and life management. Further, it sells easyPanel and easyEmbedded solutions. The company serves mechanical engineering, industrial automation, mobility, smart building and white goods, medical and healthcare, entertainment, and smart retail and signage industries. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Munich, Germany. DATA MODUL Aktiengesellschaft Produktion und Vertrieb von elektronischen Systemen operates as a subsidiary of Arrow Electronics, Inc.
